title: duggena mollis
intro: Duggena mollis, also known as Sida rhombifolia, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Duggena mollis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Duggena mollis include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
